metrics.name: datum.m1_driver.run_duration_ms
metrics.description: Wall-clock time for a single M1 RED-GREEN run on the toy fixture

metrics.name: datum.write_tool.write_to_file_duration_ms
metrics.description: Time to execute write_to_file lane-tool script for files under 10KB

metrics.name: datum.write_tool.replace_file_content_duration_ms
metrics.description: Time to execute replace_file_content lane-tool script for files under 10KB

metrics.name: datum.materialize.scaffold_duration_ms
metrics.description: Time for materialize.sh to create full scaffold (excluding uv sync)

metrics.name: datum.e2e_test.total_duration_ms
metrics.description: Total wall-clock time for the M1 e2e test run

metrics.name: datum.m1_driver.metrics_entries_count
metrics.description: Number of entries appended to local-llm-metrics.jsonl per M1 run

metrics.name: datum.m1_driver.failure_records_count
metrics.description: Number of structured JSON failure records produced by failed M1 runs

metrics.name: datum.write_tool.invocation_count
metrics.description: Number of write-tool invocations logged in multi-turn trace per session
